description: A security audit requires rotating the database credentials for the 'app-stack' running in Docker Compose at /home/ga/app-stack/. Change the PostgreSQL password for 'appuser' from 'oldpass123' to 'SecureNewPass!2024'. Update the docker-compose.yml file so both the database and Adminer services use the new password, and ensure all services are restarted and running with the new configuration. Existing data and database volumes must be preserved. Verify the update by ensuring Adminer (http://localhost:8081) can connect to the database.
